subject: We'll get there
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
[](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=49d475d0f1&e=84041254e6)
Peter,

The other day I let you know we were short of our monthly fundraising goal.

We had a huge gap to fill, with Chris Koster receiving nearly $9 million from union bosses, trial lawyers, and special interests.

I'm happy to report that we're making great progress, and are **very close** to our August fundraising goal!

Just this week, hundreds of Missourians stepped forward and contributed to our campaign. I'd like to count you among those who are invested in our mission to take Missouri in a new direction. [Will you pitch in right now to help us reach our goal?](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=0fc66c854d&e=84041254e6)

As it currently stands, **we are $21,160 from reaching our goal**. Our team tells me that this goal can be surpassed if we have a tremendous response to this email request.

If you haven't pitched in yet, **[will you donate $250, $100, or $50 right now](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=409aeecc3c&e=84041254e6)**?

With your help, we will win.

Best,
Eric

Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer

St. Louis, Missouri 63108

Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected with the campaign. If they become too much, you can [unsubscribe](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=0508afb692), but please let us know how we can improve. You can always reach us at [team@ericgreitens.com](mailto:team@ericgreitens.com) or (314) 899-0288. You're still reading the fineprint? You must be a detail oriented, all-around awesome person who is a big supporter — you should [volunteer](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=582b829b67&e=84041254e6) with us!

name: Joe Biden
subject: re: deadline
body:
This is a powerful statement | Derek --

Let me tell you why I think the upcoming Federal Election Committee fundraising deadline Hillary is facing is so important.

This race will be remembered and studied for a long time.

Derek, when you chip in to support my friend Hillary, your name goes on an official report saying that you stood with her in this watershed election. This is a powerful statement. You’re saying that you will do everything you can to make sure Hillary takes the Oath of Office as President of the United States, and that a Trump presidency is simply out of the question.

And yes, your donation goes toward funding a campaign that can win -- to get more folks knocking on doors, making phone calls, and doing everything that winning campaigns do. But when you chip in, you’re also going on the record and putting your name alongside those of millions of other donors.

This is the last FEC report we’re going to file before folks start voting. **[Chip in now and get your name on the list (and get a free Team Hillary sticker, too).**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjYzNjgxNzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY1MTg2MDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0) We’ve got a heck of a lot of money to raise and not a lot of time.

**Hillary’s counting on each and every one of us. Let’s do this for her.** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYzNjgxNzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY1MTg2MDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Joe

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 before our monthly fundraising deadline to stand with this team:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYzNjgxNzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY1MTg2MDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

**** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjYzNjgxNzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY1MTg2MDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjYzNjgxNzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY1MTg2MDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0). Opening this email on your iPhone? [Click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjYzNjgxNzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY1MTg2MDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to get our Hillary 2016 mobile app now. Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjYzNjgxNzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY1MTg2MDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjYzNjgxNzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY1MTg2MDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjYzNjgxNzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY1MTg2MDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjYzNjgxNzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY1MTg2MDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjYzNjgxNzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY1MTg2MDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjYzNjgxNzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY1MTg2MDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYzNjgxNzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY1MTg2MDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjYzNjgxNzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY1MTg2MDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Aisling Kerins, jayinslee.com
subject: Our post-primary reality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
This race could change in no time. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=OTQzMjY2OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTgyNDU4NTE0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
| Dear Friend, Republican big-money donors are now firmly behind Bill Bryant. And we know they act quickly. That's the new reality of this race. Bill Bryant can halfheartedly disavow Donald Trump one minute, then receive a cash infusion from some of Donald Trump's top donors the next. Ahead of the primary, that meant our opponent went from having almost nothing left to spend to a nearly one-million-dollar ad buy. Our race could change in a matter of minutes. But we can be prepared -- and we must be prepared. That's why we've set a $20,000 goal for this month -- our first major end-of-the-month deadline since the general election started in earnest. Peter,

Back in June, I did something no presidential campaign had ever done...

**...I personally matched every donation that came in before the end of the month, dollar-for-dollar.**

It was such a huge success -- some even called it one of the most successful fundraising efforts in American political history.

Well, guess what?

**I 'm going to do it again, and we are going to make August our best fundraising month yet.**

That's right. I am going to personally match every donation that comes in before the end of August, up to $1 million.

That means a $100 donation has a $200 impact...a $50 donation has a $100 impact...a $25 donation has a $50 impact...and a $5 donation has a $10 impact.

**[CONTRIBUTE $50 = $100 MATCHED](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37280916:W5_gS1bNd:m:1:876315805:844924E9512D4A707464E43FC2E2FB8B:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $25 = $50 MATCHED](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37280917:W5_gS1bNd:m:1:876315805:844924E9512D4A707464E43FC2E2FB8B:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $5 = $10 MATCHED](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37280918:W5_gS1bNd:m:1:876315805:844924E9512D4A707464E43FC2E2FB8B:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37280914:W5_gS1bNd:m:1:876315805:844924E9512D4A707464E43FC2E2FB8B:r)**

Help me make August our biggest fundraising month to date. Step up to the Big Leagues and show Crooked Hillary that our campaign is a lean and mean winning machine.

So, stop what you are doing. That's right.

[**Stop and donate right now, and I 'll match that donation dollar-for-dollar.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37280914:W5_gS1bNd:m:1:876315805:844924E9512D4A707464E43FC2E2FB8B:r)

It's that simple. I can't wait to hear back from you.

Best wishes,

name: John Kasich
subject: Ohio's story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising
body:
Peter,

When I first ran for governor in 2010, Ohio was
headed in the wrong direction.

More than 350,000 lost jobs, burdensome regulations, high
taxes, an unbalanced budget, the list goes on.

Our state was ready for conservative leadership and I was
determined to reverse course and make Ohio prosperous again.

In 2016, Ohio has quite the comeback story to share. We've
balanced our budget every year I've been in office and increased
our rainy day fund to more than $2 billion.

The unemployment rate was cut in half and families have more
money in their pockets thanks to tax cuts. And together we've now
created 434,500 new private sector jobs.

The secret behind our successes? Ohio is strong today because
of policies that ensure that the power comes from the people, not
big government.

The fact is, strong conservative ideals worked for America
when I led the charge to balance the federal budget as budget
chairman -- and I know it can work again. But that won't happen
if Hillary Clinton is given a blank check by a liberal majority
in the U.S. House of Representatives.

That's why we need to make sure Paul Ryan remains speaker
after the election. He knows how to get our country back on the
right track.

As of today, there are 70 days until Election Day and only 37
hours remaining before the August Fundraising Deadline. Every
freedom-loving American needs to put skin into the game. Can I
count on you?

body:
It's about people. It's about Indiana -- and Indiana's future. It's about you and it's about me.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4300795146627840000/-1128854793716627456?utm_campaign=fnd_augeom_3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160830_fnd_gq_augeom_ndn_3_jg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)
---

name: John Carney
subject: On the road with supporters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends for John Carney
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/11752812933283840/-645959782783516672)
---
| | | | | | | | | Friend,
Last week provided several opportunities for me to talk to Delaware voters. On Wednesday, we officially opened our Newark campaign office at 218 E. Main Street in Pomeroy Station, and welcomed many friends and supporters, including State Representatives Joe Kowalko and Ed Osienski, State Senator Dave Sokola, Newark Councilwoman Lisa Diller and candidate for the 22nd representative district, Lanette Edwards. If you are interested in volunteering or canvassing for us, you can stop by, or email us at volunteer@johncarney.org. On Sunday, I attended August Quarterly - the oldest African American festival that celebrates religious freedom, freedom of speech, and the right of assembly. The performance by the choir was outstanding. I also had the opportunity to join good friends at IndiaFest this weekend at the University of Delaware. I enjoyed the dance performances, and also the chance to say hello to so many friends and supporters and listen to their concerns and hopes for Delaware. I continue to share my vision to create 21st century jobs, improve our schools, keep communities safe, and fix the budget. Thank you for your continued support and encouragement. As the summer comes to an end, my campaign is saying goodbye to our student interns. I appreciated their hard work and their desire to make Delaware a better place. If you, or someone you know, would like to be an intern on the campaign, please contact us at volunteer@johncarney.org. I hope to see you on the campaign trail! Sincerely, John

Thanks for standing with me,
Patrick

name: Michelle Obama
subject: Real quick, Derek
body:
Every second matters | We're at the point in this election when every second matters, Derek -- so I won’t take up much of your time.

We’ve only got 70 days until Election Day. That’s all this team has left to finish its voter registration drives, knock on doors, make phone calls, and get folks the information they need to cast their ballots -- and ensure Hillary Clinton becomes our next president.

I couldn't be more excited to do my part to help make sure Hillary wins so we can continue to build on the progress we made together under Barack. But I can’t do this alone. Hillary needs every single one of us doing as much as we can in order to win this election -- and that includes you, too.

In order to reach as many people as possible and help get out the vote, Hillary’s campaign has set a big and important goal of raising $10 million before its critical fundraising deadline tomorrow. (And after all of Barack’s elections, I know how much those deadlines matter!) **Will you pitch in $1 to help reach that goal? When you do, the campaign will send you a free sticker as a thank you for your support:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjYzNzI3MzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY1Mjk1NDU5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you so much, Derek,

Michelle

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 before our monthly fundraising deadline to stand with this team:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYzNzI3MzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY1Mjk1NDU5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

| | Hey Peter,

Are you going to Martha Boneta's Liberty Farm Festival on Saturday, September 10th? I'll be there all day with our AFP-Virginia team, so make sure you stop by our booth and say hi! Things kick off at 12pm and end around 6pm.

Check out this lineup of speakers: Governor Jim Gilmore, The _Wall Street Journal'_ s Kimberly Strassel, AFP President Tim Phillips, and tons more. Plus, you'll get to hear from several candidates running for statewide office in Virginia next year. [The full list of speakers can be seen here](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=974e93cb869da8ab67d69228bf678690d449c4096034e6504513c77c5328af15c48a552e3c4913ed).

This a family friendly event featuring a pumpkin chucker (I'm really excited about this!), hayrides, kid inflatables, and plenty of animals. This is a perfect way to spend a Saturday with the family and wind down the summer.

Here are the details:

**What** : Liberty Farm Festival at Paris Barn**When** : Saturday, September 10th**Time** : 12-6pm**Where** : 1037 Gap Run Rd, Paris, Virginia I've been all over the Commonwealth the last few weeks and everywhere I go people are talking about the Liberty Farm Festival so make sure you [buy your tickets today.](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=974e93cb869da8ab7d2ddda0038c5e80ef8aadc802f6ce9386383d128027030e5abbe0e7cc56f90e)

Because AFP is a sponsor of this event, Martha set aside 5 tickets for our best activists. So, starting today, the top 5 activists that make the most calls or knocks the most doors through September 8th will be offered a free ticket to the Liberty Farm Festival. Plus, our President, Tim Phillips, will recognize you on the main stage. Martha knows how important activists are to the cause, so this is a great opportunity to recognize the hard workers.

I hope to see you in a few weekends at the Liberty Farm Festival. And remember, get in touch with your local Field Director ASAP so you can start to compete for those free tickets!

Best,

Tyler Foote
State Director
Americans for Prosperity Virginia
---

name: Sen. Barbara Mikulski
subject: frustrating
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Friend -- One of the most frustrating things I hear is, "I don't need to donate to Chris - he's going to win".

**That's just the kind of attitude that gave Maryland a Republican Governor in 2014.**

Maryland Republicans told the press that they were going to do everything they could to elect Chris's opponent to the U.S. Senate. I don't know how you can hear that and not feel moved to jump in and ensure that Chris has the resources he needs to win in November.

We need Chris Van Hollen in the Senate fighting for Maryland and for each of us. He will be a champion for working families and a leader on so many important issues--as he has been in the House.

And we cannot win back a Democratic majority in the Senate without first holding this key Maryland seat. There's so much at stake here- there is no way we can afford to be complacent.

**[So, let me ask--will you chip in something right now to elect Chris to be Maryland's next U.S. Senator](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a0a/70cdc2ba/47081412/397738b/2592375552/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=e083016_1&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+So+let+me+askmdashwill+you+chip+in+somet&utm_campaign=em083016_1&source=em083016_1")** [DONATE NOW >>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a0a/70cdc2ba/47081412/3977388/2592375552/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=e083016_1&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+NOW+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em083016_1&source=em083016_1") Thank you,

Barbara A. Mikulski
U.S. Senator
Maryland

>

body:
Our end of month FEC deadline is coming up. Here’s what I’m going to do. |

Peter, real quick – Just wanted to make sure you saw Reince’s email below. Reince is going to send me the list of patriotic Americans who donated to this million-dollar match challenge. body:
| | |
---

---
| |
---
| **For Immediate Release:**
Tuesday, August 30, 2016

**Contact:** Ethan Latour
(802) 595-3776
**Phil Scott Releases General Election Debate Schedule**
_Phil Scott will participate in eleven (11) gubernatorial debates_
Middlesex, Vt. – Phil Scott’s campaign today released a list of the eleven (11) debates Scott will participate in prior to the General Election in 69 days.

"Debates are an effective platform for candidates to discuss their priorities and plans, and to highlight important contrasts that exist among them," said Scott campaign spokeswoman Brittney Wilson.

“There is a clear choice in this election. Phil Scott is the only candidate who is focused on growing the economy, making Vermont more affordable and restoring Vermonters’ faith and trust in their government,” Wilson said. “Phil has set strict budget limits; has a plan to modernize state government; a plan to combat the opiate crisis; and real ideas to address our crumbling infrastructure. In the coming weeks, Phil will be rolling out a comprehensive economic development plan to reinforce his commitment to creating jobs and making Vermont more affordable. He looks forward to to highlighting the reasons why he's the right choice in this election.”

Phil Scott sees debates as valuable opportunities to further highlight the differences between him and the other candidates, Wilson continued.

“For starters, Phil’s approach to rebuilding prosperity for all Vermonters will not be through new taxes and fees like the $700 million Sue Minter’s party has forced on Vermonters over the last six years of one party rule,” Wilson said. “That is why he has committed to participate in eleven debate events.”

**PHIL SCOTT’S DEBATE SCHEDULE**
* 8/22 – VT-NEA Debate on Vermont PBS (Only major party candidates invited)*
* 9/22 – VT Commission on Women Forum (All three candidates invited)
* 9/25 – Windham County Gubernatorial Forum (All three candidates invited)
* 9/28 – VT Digger Debate in Rutland (All three candidates invited)*
* 10/6 –Vermont PBS (All three candidates invited)
* 10/10 – AARP VT (Only major party candidate invited)*
* 10/17 – vtTA and _Seven Days_ Gubernatorial Round Table (All candidates invited)
* 10/18 – WCAX (Only major party candidates invited)*
* 10/23 – Vermont Press Association (All three candidates invited) *
* 10/25 – WPTZ (All three candidates invited)
* 11/3 – VPR (All three candidates invited)

**BALANCING DEBATES WITH DIRECT VOTER DIALOGUE**
Three weeks ago, the Scott campaign issued debate criteria as a means of maximizing the time their candidate can spend engaging with Vermonters directly. “One of our requests to debate organizers was to honor the great tradition in Vermont of giving every candidate’s voice an equal opportunity to be heard in the public square,” Wilson said. “We applaud the eight (8) organizations that have invited all three candidates for Governor to make their case to voters.”

Wilson said the campaign is disappointed that three (3) organizers do not share their support for an inclusive debate of the issues. “We urged them to reconsider and invite all candidates. They politely declined. Phil is looking forward to those debates nonetheless and we respect the fact that our campaign committed to these events before the primary and before creating our criteria.”
###
*Debate/forums scheduled prior to primary and/or addition of third-party candidate on the ballot

body:
I want you to picture what his State of the Union addresses will look like | Derek --

We’re just two days out from our critical fundraising deadline, and I’m really hoping you’ll **[chip in $1 right now**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjYzNzU2MTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY1MzI0NTUwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to help us hit our $10 million goal. We’re 54 percent of the way there -- and with your help, I know we can make it over the finish line by midnight tomorrow.

I want you to take a moment to imagine what our country will actually look like if Donald Trump comes out on top in November.

I want you to picture what his State of the Union addresses will look like -- the NATO allies he’ll alienate with an unscripted, inconsiderate comment; the enemies he’ll enrage and thereby encourage with a careless challenge uttered in the spur of the moment to get a rise out of his audience. I want you to imagine what he’ll do in a moment of crisis -- when he has 10 minutes to make a life-or-death decision and hasn’t cared to learn any context for the situation at hand.

I want you to consider what will happen if we elect to the highest office in the land a man you can quite literally bait with a tweet.

We can’t let this happen. It’s as simple as that. And it starts with raising $10 million before this FEC deadline tomorrow.

**We’re $4.5 million away from our goal. Can you chip in $1 right now to help keep the Oval Office Trump-free?** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYzNzU2MTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY1MzI0NTUwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Christina

We’re 54 percent of the way there -- and with your help, I know we can make it over the finish line by midnight tomorrow. I want you to take a moment to imagine what our country will actually look like if Donald Trump comes out on top in November. I want you to picture what his State of the Union addresses will look like -- the NATO allies he’ll alienate with an unscripted, inconsiderate comment; the enemies he’ll enrage and thereby encourage with a careless challenge uttered in the spur of the moment to get a rise out of his audience. I want you to imagine what he’ll do in a moment of crisis -- when he has 10 minutes to make a life-or-death decision and hasn’t cared to learn any context for the situation at hand. I want you to consider what will happen if we elect to the highest office in the land a man you can quite literally bait with a tweet. We can’t let this happen. It’s as simple as that. And it starts with raising $10 million before this FEC deadline tomorrow. We’re $4.5 million away from our goal. Can you chip in $1 right now to help keep the Oval Office Trump-free? name: Samantha Gross (via vanhollen.org)
subject: can you help?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend,

Let me get straight to the point.

We are choosing a new U.S. Senator in November! And we cannot afford to take the race for retiring Senator Barbara Mikulski's Maryland Senate seat for granted. Chris needs our energy, our time and our support.

Chris' opponent is posing as a "moderate". She wants us to believe her positions are reasonable and in-touch with Maryland values.

Nothing is further from the truth. Pull back the curtain and you can quickly see the razor-sharp contrast between her Trump-lite ideas and Chris's strong record of championing our priorities and standing up for our values.

Can you make a donation now to ensure Chris can get his message out across Maryland? >>>

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Donate $5 immediately >>

Donate $15 immediately >>

Donate $35 immediately >>

Donate $75 immediately >>

Donate $125 immediately >>

Or, donate another amount immediately >>

Chris's opponent has deep-pocket support from the NRA and Citizens United. And Washington Republicans have been busy hosting fundraisers for her.

To cap it off, while pretending she cares about working families, her biggest supporters in the Maryland Republican Party are having Wisconsin Governor Scott Walker, the poster child of the anti-working families campaign, keynote their annual fundraiser in September. It's shameless. It's hypocritical - and it's not Maryland.

Chris Van Hollen is the only candidate in this contest with an unequivocal track record on gun safety, getting dirty money out of politics, protecting the environment, standing up for Maryland's hardworking families and getting things done.

Can you help with an immediate donation? >>>

This one matters!

Thank you for helping Chris.

Maggie McIntosh
Maryland State Delegate
Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
You're receiving this email at: dpwillis67@gmail.com
If you'd like to unsubscribe visit: http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe
